title: CSV List
documentation:
## Purpose
A CSV file with a single column containing a list of values. There are no field names; the content is purely a sequence of scalar values, one per row.

## When to use
Use `media:csv;list;textable` when a node produces a simple enumeration of values without structural fields. For multi-column tabular data, use [CSV Data](https://capdag.com/browse/media:csv;list;record;textable).

## Notes
A header row may or may not be present. Consumers should confirm this via node metadata. Single-column CSV is often interchangeable with plain newline-delimited text.
